title: Microsoft Is Reopening America's Most Infamous Nuclear Plant for AI
script: Three Mile Island — site of America's worst nuclear accident — is coming back online. Microsoft signed a 20-year power deal with Constellation Energy to restart Unit 1, shut since 2019. The plant will be renamed the Crane Clean Energy Center and generate 835 megawatts — enough for 800,000 homes. Microsoft needs the power for AI data centers. America's most infamous nuclear site is now feeding artificial intelligence.
